messages.content: today was just a lot. it's the anniversary of my mom passing and i didn't really tell anyone i was struggling with it

That's a heavy day to carry quietly. Grief on an anniversary can hit differently — sharper, sometimes, because you've been bracing for it.

What's it been like, holding that to yourself today?
thanks for just sitting with me on it. i don't usually let myself actually cry but i think i needed to

It makes sense that it came through today. Grief finds its way out eventually — and letting it doesn't mean you're falling apart.

Is there anything about her you've been wanting to say out loud, even just here?
i'm still pretty heavy ngl, it hasn't really lifted. but i've got an early start and i don't wanna keep going tonight, i think i just need to stop

That sounds like the right call — you've carried something real today, and rest matters.

Take care of yourself tonight. I'll be here whenever you want to come back to this.
yeah. gonna go lie down in the dark for a while. night
